Looking at the bar, the cursor is at the bottom section (blue). The top section has the blue frame. So I need to move the cursor up to the top section.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python

<parameter=code>

action([{'action': 'UP'} for _ in range(20)])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
